files.notes: This file contains two distinct lesson sections: a Genealogy lesson (Lesson II) focused on securing genealogical data, and a Home Ethics lesson (Lesson III) about the Christmas Spirit. The boundary between them is clear where 'DecemberHOME ETHICS AND GARDENING' begins immediately after the genealogy section ends.
